title: cgraph advisory live-state row
description: One JSONL row in .btrain/cgraph-advisory-state.jsonl. Each row is an unresolved cross-lane advisory pinned to a lane. Rows are dropped from the file when the underlying condition clears; resolved rows move to the append-only telemetry log instead.

lane.description: Lane id this advisory is pinned to (e.g. 'a', 'b').

kind.description: Taxonomy label for the advisory (e.g. lock_overlap, drift, stale_index, packet_truncated). Unknown values are accepted so new kinds can ship without a schema bump.

context_hash.description: Short sha256 prefix derived from the kind-specific context payload. Stable per (lane, kind, context) triple and used to dedupe surfacings across refreshes.

first_seen.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the first surfacing for this (lane, kind, context_hash).

last_surfaced.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent pull-model re-confirmation. Equal to first_seen on initial surface.

resolved_at.description: Always null in live state; resolved rows move to the telemetry log. Retained here so live rows and telemetry rows share one shape.

suggestion.description: Actionable next step. May be empty when the producer emits a raw finding with no linked suggestion.

advisory_id.description: Stable identifier from `kkg advise` when the advisory maps to a known situation; empty otherwise.
